changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Ajouter Hématies, Leucocytes (Etat frais Quantitatif) et 'Nombre de flore' au panel ECB-Crachat
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.panel_item (id, panel_id, lastupdated, test_id) SELECT nextval('panel_item_seq'), p.id, now(), t.id FROM clinlims.panel p JOIN clinlims.test t ON t.name IN ( 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Hématies', 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Leucocytes', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Nombre de flore' ) WHERE p.name = 'ECB-Crachat' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.panel_item pi WHERE pi.panel_id = p.id AND pi.test_id = t.id );
